scripts.setup: find "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH" \( -path "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.git" -o -path "*/node_modules" \) -prune -o \( -name ".env" -o -name ".env.local" -o -name ".env.development.local" -o -name ".env.test.local" -o -name ".env.production.local" \) -type f -print | while IFS= read -r source; do target="${source#$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/}"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$target")"; cp "$source" "$target"; done; pnpm install
